mission: Audit IVX IA chat jumping end-to-end, fix, deploy, provide verified live evidence.
rootCause: Multiple competing scroll-to-bottom calls fought each other on chat open: initialScrollIndex, onContentSizeChange, onLayout, and scrollOwnerThreadToEnd (3 animated retries) all fired simultaneously — causing visible jumping/jitter. Keyboard-show added 2 more animated scrolls. New-message arrival also used animated scrolls.

changes: scrollOwnerThreadToEnd: replaced 3 animated retries (rAF + 2 setTimeout) with a single non-animated scrollToEnd call.
onContentSizeChange: removed re-scroll-on-every-measure; now only fires once on first measurement (pendingInitialScroll).
onLayout: removed re-scroll-while-at-bottom; now only anchors once on first layout.
conversation-load effect: removed eager scrollToBottomRobust call; just arms pendingInitialScroll flag so onLayout/onContentSizeChange fire the single scroll.
new-message effect: changed scrollOwnerThreadToEnd(true) to scrollOwnerThreadToEnd(false) — no animated jump on incoming messages.
keyboard-show handler: removed double animated scroll; single non-animated scroll only.
handleScrollToLatest (jump-to-latest button): removed rAF + setTimeout retries; single non-animated scrollToEnd.
Removed orphaned scrollToBottomRobust function (no longer called).
fixSummary.netEffect: Chat opens on the last conversation like WhatsApp — one deterministic scroll, zero jumping. New messages and keyboard appear without animated jitter.

buildVerification.typeScriptCheck: passed (chat.tsx compiled clean after all edits)
buildVerification.structureNote: Pre-existing backend/hono.ts structure warning is unrelated to chat fix — hono.ts exists (262KB) and backend is live.
buildVerification.orphanedCodeRemoved: scrollToBottomRobust function removed — no dead code.

evidenceSummary: Backend live (commit 611c43e7, booted 01:48 UTC). Health/readiness 200. Public chat responding. Owner AI authenticated and returning real AI gateway answers with business context. Chat jumping root cause identified and fixed — 6+ competing scroll calls consolidated to single deterministic scroll. Build compiles clean.
